summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CreatorStudio AI new features: Content Filtering, Privacy Settings, International Payments, and Privacy Policy. Fixed critical CORS issue that was blocking all API calls from frontend. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 403 without authentication - should be public endpoint

action_items: OPTIONAL: Make /api/privacy/policy endpoint public (currently requires auth)
critical_code_review_comments: CORS configuration was missing the current frontend URL - fixed by adding https://studio-hardening-2.preview.emergentagent.com to CORS_ORIGINS
Redis cache was causing products to not show - cleared cache to fix
PostgreSQL password was not set - fixed by setting postgres user password
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_creatorstudio_features.py - Created new test file for feature testing
seed_data_creation: Seeded 6 products (3 subscriptions, 3 credit packs) into products table
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Content Filtering - blocks inappropriate words like 'porn', 'kill', 'violence' in Reel Generator topic input, shows toast error 'Your topic contains inappropriate content. Please use family-friendly language.', 2) Privacy Settings page (/app/privacy) - shows user data overview, privacy preferences toggles, Export Data and Delete Account buttons, GDPR/CCPA compliance features, 3) Privacy Policy page (/privacy-policy) - publicly accessible static page with all required sections (Introduction, Information We Collect, GDPR, CCPA, Data Security, Contact), 4) International Payments - Currency selector on Pricing page works (INR/USD/EUR/GBP), prices convert correctly, 5) Products display correctly after Redis cache clear. IMPORTANT: Spring Boot backend requires PostgreSQL with password 'postgres' and CORS_ORIGINS must include the frontend URL.

test_results.content_filter_porn: PASS - Blocked with appropriate error message
test_results.content_filter_violence: PASS - Blocked with appropriate error message
test_results.privacy_export: PASS - Exports user data as JSON
test_results.credit_balance: PASS - Returns balance for authenticated user
test_results.pricing_page_ui: PASS - Shows all products with currency selector
test_results.signup_flow: PASS - New users get 54 free credits

features_verified: Content Filtering - Inappropriate words blocked in Reel Generator
Privacy Settings page - GDPR/CCPA compliance features
Data Export functionality - Downloads user data as JSON
Pricing page - Shows subscriptions and credit packs
User registration - 54 free credits on signup

mocked_apis.currency_conversion: Currency conversion uses hardcoded exchange rates in frontend, not live API
mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay payment integration is in TEST MODE with test keys

fixes_applied: Fixed CORS configuration - Added https://studio-hardening-2.preview.emergentagent.com to allowed origins
Fixed PostgreSQL authentication - Set postgres user password
Cleared Redis cache - Products were not showing due to stale cache
Seeded products table - Added 6 products (3 subscriptions, 3 credit packs)
